title: Office Fridge Warning
text:
## Office Fridge Warning

To whoever stole my {adjective} {food}: I know it was you.

The container was {color}, clearly marked with {person}, and guarded by {number} tiny {plural noun}.

If you do not return it by {day of week}, I will {verb} the break room camera and notify a {job}.

Also, please remove the {animal} from shelf three.

It has been {verb ending in -ing} beside my {object}, wearing a {clothing item}, and making everyone feel {emotion}. Bring {number} {plural noun} and a {color} {noun}.
